title: Faithful: PAEGlow param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 13.5 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAEGlow must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAEGlow to range extremes across hosts ['Lights__Bloom'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=13.47 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAEGlow implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAEGlow` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "Lights__Bloom", "param": "opacity", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 52.987, "ddb": 13.469}, {"host": "Lights__Bloom", "param": "softness", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 52.987, "ddb": 13.608}, {"host": "Lights__Bloom", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 52.987, "ddb": 13.647}, {"host": "Lights__Bloom", "param": "cliptowhite", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 51.833, "ddb": 13.839}, {"host": "Lights__Bloom", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.5, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 26.527, "ddb": 19.657}, {"host": "Lights__Bloom", "param": "360\u00b0aware", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 17.38, "ddb": 23.33}]
